# 销售合同 / Sales Contract (Template)

合同编号 / Contract No.: [CONTRACT_NO]
签订日期 / Date: [YYYY-MM-DD]
卖方 / Seller:
- 公司名称 / Company: [Seller Company Name]
- 地址 / Address: [Seller Address]
- 联系人 / Contact: [Name, Email, Phone]

买方 / Buyer:
- 公司名称 / Company: [Buyer Company Name]
- 地址 / Address: [Buyer Address]
- 联系人 / Contact: [Name, Email, Phone]

1. 标的物 / Goods
- 产品名称 / Description: [Product Name]
- 型号/规格 / Model & Specs: [Model/Specs]
- 单位 / Unit: [pcs/sets/kg]
- 数量 / Quantity: [xxx]

2. 价格与货币 / Price & Currency
- 单价 / Unit Price: [USD xx.xx per unit]
- 总价 / Total Price: [USD xxxx.xx]
- 贸易术语 / Incoterm: [e.g., FOB Shanghai]
- 报价有效期 / Quotation Valid Until: [YYYY-MM-DD]

3. 包装 / Packing
- 包装方式 / Packing Method: [e.g., Carton, Wooden Crate]
- 每箱数量 / Qty per Carton: [xx]

4. 交货期与方式 / Delivery
- 交货期 / Lead Time: [e.g., 30 days after deposit]
- 装运港 / Port of Loading: [Port]
- 目的港 / Port of Destination: [Port]

5. 付款条款 / Payment
- 付款方式 / Payment Method: [e.g., T/T 30% deposit, 70% before shipment]
- 信用证 / L/C 条款（如适用）: [L/C details]

6. 检验与验收 / Inspection & Acceptance
- 质量标准 / Quality Standard: [e.g., AQL 2.5/4.0]
- 检验方式 / Inspection Method: [e.g., Pre-shipment inspection by SGS]

7. 单证 / Documents
- 商业发票、装箱单、提单、原产地证（如适用）、检验证书等 / Commercial Invoice, Packing List, B/L, CO, Inspection Cert.

8. 违约责任 / Liability
- 迟延交货、数量/质量不符的赔偿方式 / Penalties and remedies.

9. 不可抗力 / Force Majeure
- 因不可抗力导致的履约延迟豁免条款 / Force majeure clause.

10. 争议解决 / Dispute Resolution
- 适用法律 / Governing Law: [Country]
- 争议解决 / Arbitration or Court: [e.g., ICC Arbitration in Hong Kong]

签字 / Signatures:
Seller: ____________________    Date: __________
Buyer:  ____________________    Date: __________
